calendar.matters:
Petition For Relief From Breach Of Trust; For Accounting; For Removal Of Trustee; And Order Appointi
Off Calendar Jan-31-2018 Text Ruling

Petition For Relief From Breach Of Trust; For Accounting; For Removal Of Trustee; And Order Appointi
Off Calendar Jan-03-2018 Continued To Jan-31-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Marc Libarle for Petitioner.

The Court notes that the Trustee is in Contra Costa County and questions venue. Mr. Labarle stated that the real property is in San Francisco and has a rental, that overseeing of the property is in San Francisco and asked the Court to keep the matter here for a short time to see if the Trustee is engaged in activity in San Francisco. The Petition for Relief from Breach of Trust. etc. is continued to January 31, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 with the understanding that the Court will not go forward because it lacks venue without something to the contrary.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
